title: Onward task success acknowledgment (stdout/stderr line, v1)
description: When work.require_success_ack is true, the executor must print at least one line of JSON matching this shape (typically the last such line in stdout or stderr wins). Onward scans lines bottom-up. See docs/WORK_HANDOFF.md.

run_id.description: Optional; when set, must equal ONWARD_RUN_ID passed in the executor environment.
